text.title: LLM Observability and Monitoring — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying `llm-observability`. Each step lists input artifact, action, output artifact. Decision gates live in content/06-decision-tree.xml.

step.name: instrument-traces
step.action: Add @observe / langfuse_handler / OTel spans; verify 100% coverage.

step.name: wire-cost
step.action: Compute cost_usd per call; persist; dashboard.

step.name: wire-eval
step.action: Schedule probe runs; record metric; expose as Prometheus.
